controls.name: Consent Obligation
controls.description: Valid, free, specific, informed, and unambiguous consent must be obtained
requirements: Consent must be free and specific
Consent withdrawal mechanism must be provided
controls.attack_scenario: An attacker could process personal data without user knowledge if consent is not properly obtained
controls.business_impact: Regulatory fines up to ₹250 crore, reputational damage, legal action
controls.remediation: Implement consent management platform with granular opt-in options

controls.name: Notice to Data Principal
controls.description: Clear notice must be provided before processing personal data
requirements: Notice must be in clear language
Purpose of processing must be disclosed
Data principal rights must be explained
controls.attack_scenario: Users may unknowingly consent to data sharing without proper notice
controls.business_impact: Loss of user trust, regulatory scrutiny, consent invalidation
controls.remediation: Create comprehensive privacy notice with clear language and easy access

controls.name: Data Principal Rights
controls.description: Right to access, correction, and erasure of personal data
requirements: Access request process must be defined
controls.attack_scenario: User cannot verify what data is stored or request deletion
controls.business_impact: GDPR/DPDPA violations, user complaints, regulatory action
controls.remediation: Implement DSAR (Data Subject Access Request) automation system

controls.name: Data Protection Officer
controls.description: DPO must be appointed for significant data fiduciaries
controls.attack_scenario: No accountable person for data protection decisions
controls.business_impact: Compliance failures, lack of oversight, regulatory penalties
controls.remediation: Appoint qualified DPO and publish contact information

controls.name: Security Safeguards
controls.description: Reasonable security measures to protect personal data
requirements: Encryption for data at rest and in transit
controls.attack_scenario: Data breach through unauthorized access or interception
controls.business_impact: Data breach, financial loss, regulatory fines, reputation damage
controls.remediation: Implement encryption, MFA, and regular penetration testing

controls.name: Breach Notification
controls.description: Mandatory notification of personal data breaches
requirements: Breach must be notified to Board
controls.attack_scenario: Delayed breach notification allows continued exploitation
controls.business_impact: Extended breach impact, regulatory fines, legal liability
controls.remediation: Implement incident response plan with automated notification

controls.name: Children's Data
controls.description: Special protection for children's personal data
controls.attack_scenario: Children's data processed without parental knowledge
controls.business_impact: Legal violations, parental complaints, regulatory action
controls.remediation: Implement age verification and parental consent workflow

controls.name: Cross-border Transfer
controls.description: Restrictions on transferring personal data outside India
controls.attack_scenario: Data transferred to countries with weak protection laws
controls.remediation: Review data transfer mechanisms and implement SCCs
